data.title: test-nextjs-starter-docs: test_claude_md_has_bootstrap_row uses content-phrase grep on non-executable CLAUDE.md (Rule 5 violation)
data.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding not addressed in this session.
Finding: test_claude_md_has_bootstrap_row uses grep -q 'Bootstrap' on CLAUDE.md, a non-executable instruction file. Per Rule 5 of the behavioral testing standard, content phrase assertions on instruction file body text are change-detector tests. Consider narrowing to a structural contract assertion or document as intentional exception.
File: tests/skills/test-nextjs-starter-docs.sh
Category: verification
